privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Marka fure qol cusub la helo — si toos ah u dir dhammaan aaladahaaga (E2E encrypted)
privacy.backupHint: Fur dhammaan furayaasha ereyga sirta ah oo u keydi serverka. Marka aaladda la beddelo — soo celi hal ereyood.
privacy.crossSignHint: Si toos ah u xaqiiji aaladaha cusub iyada oo loo marayo saxiixda HMAC (ilaalinta ka beddelashada)
privacy.federatedHint: Faafi qaybaynta kaydka encrypted nodes federation-ka (qaab Shamir). Xitaa haddii server-ku lumaan — soo celi iyada oo loo marayo peers.
privacy.historySyncHint: Koobiga encrypted ee fariimaha ee la heli karo dhammaan aaladaha. Server-ku wuxuu araa oo kaliya cod-dirir
privacy.ktHint: Diiwaanka oo kaliya ku dara dhammaan isbedelada furaha dadweynaha oo leh silsilad hash (Merkle). Server-ku wuxuu saxiixaa each entry — jaadfalku wuxuu la ogaanayaa xiligii baaritaanka.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: U gudbi furayaasha aalad cusub iyada oo loo marayo koodh 6-lambar. Furayaashu waxay ku xidhan yihiin ECIES — server-ku ma akhrin karo.
privacy.ssssHint: Qaybso furahe master-ka N qaybood iyada oo loo marayo qaabka Shamir. Qaybo kasta oo M ah ayaa furahe soo celin doona. Qaybta kasta waxaa loogu encrypted yahay xiriir aamin ah (ECIES). Server-ku wuxuu araa oo kaliya blobs encrypted.

botConstructor.docsCommand: Ka jawaaba marka isticmaaluhu soo diro amar gaar ah (tusaale/help,/bilow). Waxaad ku dari kartaa tillaabooyinka wada sheekeysiga si aad u abuurto wada hadal dhowr tallaabo ah.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Waxay ka jawaabtaa marka fariinta isticmaaluhu ay ku habboon tahay qaabka. Wuxuu isticmaalaa regex - tusaale "hello|hi" ayaa ku habboon labada eray. Kiis aan dareen lahayn.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: Farriinta ugu horeysa ee isticmaala waxay arkaan marka ay ku bilaabaan bot-ka / bilaabista. Bot kasta waa inuu lahaadaa mid.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Wuxuu si toos ah fariin ugu diraa jadwalka Ku fiican xasuusinta maalinlaha ah, dheefshiidka toddobaadlaha ah, ama ogeysiisyada xilliyada ah.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Laamaha caqliga bot Hubi doorsoomaha ama gelinta isticmaalaha oo uga jawaab si kala duwan iyadoo ku saleysan natiijada.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot wuxuu ka soo xushay hal jawaab si aan kala sooc lahayn liiska. Ku fiican kaftanka, talooyinka, salaanta, ama jawaabaha kala duwan.
botConstructor.docsApi: Wuxuu sameeyaa codsi HTTP API dibadeed wuxuuna adeegsadaa jawaabta fariinta bot. Isticmaal {data.field} si aad u tixraacdo goobaha jawaabta.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Waxay u dirtaa ogeysiin maamulka qolka marka la kiciyo. Faa'iido u leh ogeysiisyada, ogeysiisyada isticmaalaha cusub, ama dhexdhexaadinta.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Ku dar tillaabooyin block Command si aad u abuurto wada hadal is dhexgal ah. Tallaabo kastaa waxay waydiisaa su'aal, waxay sugtaa jawaabta isticmaalaha, oo waxay ku kaydisaa doorsoome. U isticmaal doorsoomayaasha jawaabta u dambaysa ee leh {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: U isticmaal xargaha laablaaban ee qoraalka jawaabta si aad u geliso qiimayaal firfircoon. Doorsoomayaasha dawladu waxay ku sii jiraan fariimaha dhexdooda.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Doorsoomayaasha la dhisay ayaa laga heli karaa jawaab kasta:
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: Waxaad isticmaali kartaa habaynta HTML oo kale ah jawaabaha:

gravitixDocs.title: Tixraaca Luqadda Gravitix
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Luuqad qoraal ah oo waxqabad sare leh oo lagu dhisayo bots 96 astaamood. Daxalka dambe.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: Gravitix waa luqad gaar ah (DSL) oo loogu talagalay in laga bilaabo dhulka qoritaanka bots Vortex. Meesha ay luqadaha kale uga baahan yihiin maktabado, dib-u-warcelin, iyo boodh-kulul, Gravitix wuxuu ku siinayaa maamulayaasha dhacdada heerka koowaad, qulqulka wada sheekeysiga, iyo dhisme ku dhex jira xaalad-dhammaan waxay ku sugan yihiin hab nadiif ah, oo la akhriyi karo oo ay dhiirigelisay Rust.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: Wax la akhriyi karo — code waxa uu u akhriyaa sida ulajeeddada, ma aha mishiin
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Nabdoon - Noocyada taagan waxay qabtaan khaladaadka ka hor wakhtiga run
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Muujin - socodka, ilaalada, iyo isbarbardhigga qaabka ayaa gudaha ku dhex jira
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Ugu yar - ma jiraan fasallo, ma laha dhaxal, ma jiraan qaab-dhismeedka si ay u bartaan
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: Gravitix waxaa loogu talagalay qof kasta oo raba inuu si dhakhso ah u dhiso bot Vortex - haddii aadan waligaa kood u qorin, ama aad tahay horumariye khibrad leh oo ka daalay kuleyliyaha Python. Tixraacani waxa uu Gravitix ka barayaa mabaadi'da koowaad: khibrad hore looma baahna.
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Qayb kastaa waxay ku dhistaa kuwii hore. Haddii aad ku cusub tahay barnaamijka, kor ilaa hoos wax ka akhri. Haddii aad hore u taqaanay luqad kale, isticmaal shaxda tusmada si aad toos ugu booddo waxa aad xiisayso.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Waddada ugu dhakhsaha badan ee eber ilaa bot socda.
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: on /bilow {... } - wuxuu qeexayaa maamulaha ordaya marka isticmaaluhu soo diro / bilaabo. siidayn "..." - waxay fariin ugu soo celisaa isticmaalaha. {ctx.first_name} — waxa uu isku xidhaa isticmaalaha magaciisa kowaad ee xadhigga
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: Gudaha Gravitix IDE, dhagsii badhanka Run ee ku yaal bar sare. Geli Vortex Bot Token marka lagu weydiiyo. Botgu isla markiiba wuu bilaabmaa - tallaabo dhismo looma baahna.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Barnaamij kasta oo Gravitix waxa laga dhisay saddex dhismo oo aasaasi ah: gacan-ku-hayayaal, hadallo sii daaya, iyo caqli-gal.
gravitixDocs.multipleHandlers: Gacanqabayaal badan oo isku mid ah
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: Qiime kasta oo ku yaal Gravitix wuxuu leeyahay nooc. Nidaamka nooca waa mid taagan: noocyada waxaa la hubiyaa wakhtiga la ururinayo, ka hor inta uusan bot-kaagu socon.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Hawl-wadeenadu waxay isku daraan qiyamka si ay u soo saaraan qiyam cusub.
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: Xargaha ku jira Gravitix waa UTF-8 qoraal la suray. Waxay taageeraan isdhexgalka qani ah iyo qayb ka mid ah hawlgallada la dhisay.
gravitixDocs.stringOperations: Hawlgallada xargaha iyada oo la adeegsanayo gudaha gudaha
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Qaabka-is-barbar dhig qiimaha qaabab badan. Ka fakar sida hadal beddelaad xoog leh.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: Shaqaaluhu waa blocks kood dib loo isticmaali karo. Waxay kaa caawinayaan inaad iska ilaaliso ku celcelinta waxayna kaa dhigayaan koodhka si sahlan loo fahmo.
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: Xakameeyayaashu waa wadnaha bot Gravitix. Maamule kastaa wuxuu dhagaystaa nooc gaar ah oo dhacdo ah wuxuuna ordaa marka ay dhacdadaasi dhacdo.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: Ilaalada ayaa kuu ogolaanaya inaad shuruud ku darto maamule. Qabanqaabiyuhu waxa uu orda oo kaliya haddii ilaaliyaha uu ku qiimeeyo run.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: Shayga ctx si toos ah ayaa looga heli karaa gudaha maamule kasta. Waxay ka kooban tahay macluumaadka ku saabsan fariinta hadda iyo isticmaalayaasha soo diray.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: Gobolku wuxuu u ogolaanayaa bot-gaaga inuu xasuusto waxyaabaha u dhexeeya fariimaha. Dawlad la'aan, farriin kastaa waa madaxbannaan tahay, bot-kuna ma laha xasuus.
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Socodku wuxuu kuu ogolaanayaa inaad ku qorto wada sheekaysiga talaabooyin badan oo toosan, qaab la akhriyi karo. Socodku wuu hakadin karaa oo sugi karaa fariinta soo socota ee isticmaalaha.
gravitixDocs.emitDesc: Diritaanka fariimaha waa wax-soo-saarka koowaad ee bot.
gravitixDocs.emitTo: emit_to - u dir isticmaale gaar ah
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Si otomaatig ah ugu socodsii koodhka jadwal-ma jiro shaqooyin cron, looma baahna adeeg dibadeed.
gravitixDocs.everyRepeat: mid kasta - ku celi inta u dhaxaysa
gravitixDocs.atSpecificTime: at - ku ordo wakhti go'an oo maalinta ah
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: Hawl-wadeenka tuubbada >> waxa uu u gudbiyaa qiimaha sida doodda koowaad ee shaqada xigta. Waxay ka dhigtaa hawlgallada silsiladda la akhriyi karo, bidix ilaa midig.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: Gravitix wuxuu bixiyaa maaraynta khaladka habaysan ee isku dayga / qabashada / ugu dambeyntii blocks.
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Qaab-dhismeedku wuxuu kuu ogolaanayaa inaad ku ururiso xogta la xidhiidha nooca magacaaban. Enums ayaa qeexaya kala duwanaansho xiran.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: Gravitix waxay rabtaa maktabad xisaabeed dhamaystiran oo leh ~180 hawlood.
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: Gravitix wuxuu leeyahay nooc kakan oo wadani ah - labo ka mid ah 64-bit sabeyn oo matalaya qaybaha dhabta ah iyo kuwa mala awaalka ah.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: Gravitix waxa ku jira kalkuluus nambareed: derivatives iyo integrals oo lagu xisaabiyay hawlo aan sabab lahayn.
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: Aljabrada toosan waa xisaabta matoorka iyo maadooyinka.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Aragtida lambarku waxay barataa sifooyinka shaandhada. Aasaaska qarsoodiga casriga ah.
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Tirakoobku wuxuu bixiyaa qalab lagu qeexo, lafo-guro, oo laga soo saaro gabagabada xogta.
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: Hawlaha gaarka ah ayaa xal u ah isla'egyada kala duwan ee muhiimka ah.
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: Isbeddelka Fourier-ka wuxuu u kala jajabiyaa calaamadda soo noqnoqoshada xubnaha.
gravitixDocs.bp1: Had iyo jeer ka qabso waxa aan la garanayn
gravitixDocs.bp3: Isticmaal ilaalo halkii aad ka isticmaali lahayd haddii-silsilad ogolaansho
gravitixDocs.bp5: Isticmaal soo-celinta hore si aad u yarayso buul-saarka
gravitixDocs.bp7: Dib u deji gobolka si taxadar leh
gravitixDocs.bp8: Isticmaal gobolka si aad uga hortagto spam
gravitixDocs.keepLearningDesc: Habka ugu wanaagsan ee lagu baran karo Gravitix waa in la dhiso. Ku bilow bot echo fudud, ka dibna ku dar xaalad, ka dibna ku dar socodka. Fikrad kasta oo cusub oo aad barato waxay kuu furaysaa fursado badan.

complex_type.li5: Awood: z**n waxa ay isticmaashaa qaaciidada De Moivre ee integer n
complex_type.p1: Nambar kakan ayaa leh foomka a + bi, halkaasoo a ay tahay qaybta dhabta ah iyo b waa qaybta mala-awaalka ah. i waa unugga mala-awaalka ah ee lagu qeexay i² = -1. Nambarada isku dhafan waxay fidiyaan xariiqda dhabta ah ilaa diyaarad, iyagoo u oggolaanaya xalalka isla'egyada sida x² + 1 = 0 oo aan lahayn jawaab dhab ah.
complex_type.p2: Gudaha Gravitix waxaad ku qortaa suugaan khayaali ah oo wata i daba-gal ah:
complex_type.p3: Dhammaan afarta hawlgal ee aasaasiga ah waxay si toos ah uga shaqeeyaan qiyamka adag. Gravitix wuxuu raacayaa xeerarka xisaabinta adag ee caadiga ah:
complex_type.p4: Habaynta ishaarada (falanqaynta maqalka, FFT), jiilka jaban (Mandelbrot set), jilida fiisigiska, xisaabinta carqaladaynta korantada, iyo xisaabinta tirada dhamaantood waxay u baahan yihiin xisaab adag. Gravitix wuxuu kuu ogolaanayaa inaad ku socodsiiso xisaabaadkan gudaha Vortex bot oo aan lahayn maktabado dibadeed.
complex_type.td14: Laga soo bilaabo qaabka polar: r·e^(iθ) = r·cos θ + ir·sin θ
complex_type.td24: Hawlaha kicinta ayaa lagu fidiyay diyaarad adag
complex_type.td8: Isku xidhka isku dhafan: a+bi → a-bi

error.p1: Ku duub kood kasta oo ku dhici kara block try Haddi cilad tahay thrown - ha ahaato Gravitix runtime ama si cad koodka - fulinta waxay u booddaa catch block. Qiimaha la qabtay wuxuu ku xidhan yahay doorsoomaha aad u magacawday catch.
error.p2: finally wuxuu ku shaqeeyaa shuruud la'aan - ha ahaato try ha guulaysteen ama catch ha ahaato qalad. U isticmaal si aad u sii deyso agabka, u gasho, ama aad u dirto fariin dhammaystiran.
error.p3: U isticmaal khaladka maaraynta hawlaha ku xidhan gelinta dibadda: kala saarista qoraalka isticmaalaha, wacitaanka API-yada, akhriska doorsoomayaasha deegaanka, ama samaynta xisaab adag oo ay suurtagal tahay khaladaadka domainka (sqrt of negative, log of eber) ay suurtogal tahay. Khaladaadka macquulka ah ee gudaha, door bidi guard clauses iyo returns hore.

intro.li1: Waa la akhriyi karaa - Koodhku wuxuu u akhriyaa sida ulajeeddada, ma aha mishiinada
intro.li2: Safe - noocyada kala duwan catch khaladaadka ka hor wakhtiga run.
intro.li3: Expressive — flows, guards, iyo naqshad matching ayaa lagu dhex dhisay
intro.li4: Ugu Yar — ma jiraan fasallo, dhaxal ma jiro, ma jiraan qaab-dhismeedka wax lagu barto
intro.p1: Gravitix waa luuqad gaar ah oo domain (DSL) loogu talagalay in lagu qoro Vortex bots. Meesha luqadaha kale uga baahan yihiin maktabado, dib-u-warcelin, iyo biyo kululeeyaha, Gravitix waxay ku siinaysaa maamulayaasha dhacdada heerka koowaad, wada sheekaysiga flow, iyo state ku dhex dhisan - dhammaan waxay ku qoran yihiin erayo nadiif ah, la akhriyi karo oo uu dhiirigeliyay Rust.
intro.p2: Gravitix waxaa loogu talagalay qof kasta oo raba inuu si dhakhso ah u dhiso Vortex bot - haddii aadan waligaa kood u qorin, ama aad tahay horumariye khibrad leh oo daalan Python boodhka Tixraacani wuxuu barayaa Gravitix mabaadi'da koowaad: khibrad hore looma baahna.
intro.p3: Qayb kastaa waxay ku dhistaa kuwii hore. Haddii aad ku cusub tahay barnaamijka, kor ilaa hoos wax ka akhri. Haddii aad hore u taqaanay luqad kale, isticmaal shaxda tusmada si aad toos ugu booddo waxa aad xiisayso.
intro.p4: Tixraacan oo dhan, → macneheedu waa "wuxuu ku qiimeeyaa" ama "soo saarayaa", iyo // ... waxay tilmaamaysaa faallooyinka uu iska indho-tiray isku-dubariduhu.

math_complex.li3: Qaabka Polar z = |z|·e^(i·arg(z)) = |z|·(cos θ + i·sin θ)
math_complex.p1: Nambar kasta oo adag z = a + bi waxa loo arki karaa sidii dhibic (a, b) ee diyaaradda Argand. dhidibka jiifa waa dhidibka dhabta ah, ka toosan waa dhidibka male-awaalka ah.
math_complex.p2: Mid ka mid ah aqoonsiga ugu muhiimsan ee xisaabta: e^(ix) = cos x + i·sin x. Tani waxay ka dhigan tahay goobada halbeegga ee diyaaradda kakan waxaa lagu qiyaasaa xagal x.
math_complex.p3: Jibbaarada kakan, sinaha, cosine, iyo logarithm ayaa lagu fidiyay diyaarad kakan oo dhamaystiran. Taxanahooda Taylor waxay isugu yimaadaan everymeel (ama saxanka loogu talagalay log).
math_complex.p4: Wixii kakan z iyo w, z^w = e^(w·ln z). Tani waxay u oggolaanaysaa jibbaarada aan isku xidhka lahayn iyo kuwa kakan, iyagoo muujinaya xidhiidhyo yaab leh:
math_complex.td10: Tiirarka ku yaal z = π/2 + nπ
math_complex.td4: Laanta maamulaha; joojinta dhidibka dhabta ah ee taban

math_core.td27: Log binary. log₂(1024) = 10. Tirada loo baahan yahay.
math_core.td29: Saldhig aan sabab lahayn: log_b(x) = ln(x)/ln(b)
math_core.td33: Isku soo wada duuboo: saqafka (3.2) = 4, saqafka (-3.2) = -3

math_linalg.p1: Vector waa liis la dalbaday oo lambaro ah. Waxay matali kartaa barta meel bannaan, jihada, xawaaraha, ama sifada ku jirta ML.
math_linalg.p2: Matrix-ku waa 2D tirooyin kala duwan. Matrix m×n waxa uu leeyahay saf m iyo tiirar n. Matrix hawlgallada ayaa ah udub dhexaadka isbeddellada toosan.
math_linalg.td1: Alaabta dhibicda: Σ aᵢ·bᵢ. Natiijadu waa scalar. dhibic (a,b) = |a||b|cos θ
math_linalg.td10: Matrix isku dhufashada (A waa m×k, B waa k×n → natiijo m×n)
math_linalg.td11: Ku dhufo every curiye scalar s
math_linalg.td12: Isku beddel safafka iyo tiirarka: Aᵀ[i][j] = A[j][i]
math_linalg.td13: Go'aamiye (LU burburka). Aan eber ahayn ↔ rogan karo.
math_linalg.td14: Matrix rogan A⁻¹ sida A·A⁻¹ = I (Gauss-Jordan)
math_linalg.td16: Tirada safafka/ tiirarka toosan ee madax banaan
math_linalg.td19: Ku xalli nidaamka toosan Ax = b iyada oo loo marayo ciribtirka Gaussian
math_linalg.td2: Wax soo saarka laba qaybood oo 3D ah. Natiijadu ⊥ labada wax gal |a×b| = |a||b| dembi θ
math_linalg.td4: Xubin unug: v / |v|. Dhererku wuxuu noqonayaa 1.
math_linalg.td7: Ku dhufo curiye kasta scalar s
math_linalg.td8: Element-xikmad leh oo lagu daro maaddooyin isku mid ah

math_numth.cc4: Hubiyaha mala awaalka Goldbach: every xataa n>2 waa wadarta laba asal
math_numth.td1: Qaybiyaha guud ee ugu weyn iyada oo loo marayo Euclidean algorithm. gcd (12,8)=4

math_numth.td19: Nambarada isku dhufashada ee nooca labaad: qaybinta n galay k qayb hoosaadyo aan faaruq ahayn
math_numth.td21: Nambarada Catalan: isku xigxiga garabka, geedaha binary
math_numth.td25: Lambarada Bernoulli (ka muuqda Taylor taxane trig/log ah)
math_numth.td3: Dhammaan qaybiyeyaasha togan ee n, la soocay. qaybiyayaal(12)=[1,2,3,4,6,12]
math_numth.td4: Euler's totient φ(n): tirinta tirooyin ku jira [1,n] kombuyuutar ilaa n
math_numth.td5: Modular rogaal celis ah: x sida a·x ≡ 1 (mod m). Waxaa loo adeegsaday RSA.
math_numth.td6: Tibaaxaha modular degdega ah: base^exp mod. O (log exp).
math_numth.td7: Imtixaanka koowaad ee Miller-Rabin (waxaa lagu go'aamiyaa n < 3.2×10¹⁸)
math_numth.td8: All primes ilaa n via Sieve of Eratosthenes

math_special.cc12: Wareegga ellipse leh afar faasas a, b:
math_special.cc2: P(-σ < X < σ) qaybinta caadiga ah
math_special.cc3: Joogtada Apéry: ζ(3) waa caqli-darro laakiin qaab xidhan lama yaqaan
math_special.cc4: J₀(x): rogrogmado oo qudhun-waxa uu qeexayaa hirarka shucaaca
math_special.cc5: Y₀(x): kala duwanaa x=0, oscillates x weyn
math_special.cc6: Ai si xad dhaaf ah ayey u qudhuntaa x→+∞, oscillates x→-∞
math_special.cc8: ( kala duwan Legendre polynomials waa orthogonal)
math_special.p1: Shaqada Gamma Γ(n) waa isugeynta joogtada ah ee warshadaynta: Γ(n) = (n-1)! ee tirooyinka togan. Waxay ku fidsan tahay tirooyinka dhabta ah iyo kuwa adag.
math_special.p2: Shaqada qaladka erf(x) = (2/√π)∫₀ˣ e^(-t²)dt waa udub dhexaad u ah Gaussiyanka. Waxay si toos ah ula xiriirtaa CDF caadiga waxayna ka muuqataa isla'egyada kulaylka iyo aragtida itimaalka.
math_special.p3: ζ(-yada) = Σ 1/nˢ ee n=1,2,3,… (marka dib(yada)>1). Waxa uu ku xidhaa qaybinta ugu muhiimsan iyada oo loo sii marayo alaabta Euler. Qiyaasta Riemann (aan la xallin!) waxay khusaysaa eber ζ diyaaradda kakan.
math_special.p4: Hawlaha Bessel Jₙ(x) iyo Yₙ(x) waxay xal u yihiin isla'egta kala duwan ee Bessel: x²y''+ xy' + (x²−n²)y = 0. Waxay ka muuqdaan faafinta hirarka, kulaylka ku haynta dhululubada, iyo makaanikada quantum.
math_special.p5: Ai(x) iyo Bi(x) ayaa xal u ah y '' = xy. Waxay ka muuqdaan tunnel-ka quantum (WKB qiyaastii) iyo optics (diffraction).
math_special.p6: Qoysaskan tiro badan waxay u soo baxaan sidii hawl-wadeennada muhiimka ah waxaana loo adeegsadaa hababka spectral, quadrature, iyo makaanikada tirada.
math_special.p7: K(k) iyo E (k) waa iskudhaf dhamaystiran oo ah nooca koowaad iyo labaad. Waxay xisaabiyaan muddada pendulum-ka aan tooska ahayn iyo wareegga ellipse.
math_special.td5: Pₙ (x): orthogonal on [-1,1]. Qayb xagal ah oo ka mid ah hirarka hydrogen.
math_special.td6: Hₙ(x): orthogonal w.r.t. e^(-x²). Quantum harmonic oscillator.
math_special.td8: Lₙ(x): orthogonal on [0,∞) w.r.t. e^ (-x). Hirarka shucaaca Hydrogen.

wizard.adminPasswordHint: Loo baahan yahay CA ku rakibida dukaanka aaminaada nidaamka Password hal mar ayaa la isticmaalaa lamana kaydin
wizard.mkcertInfo: mkcert waxay abuurtaa shahaadooyin maxalli ah oo la aamini karo iyada oo aan loo digin browserka. Gebi ahaanba bilaash ah, wuxuu shaqeeyaa internet la'aan.
wizard.domainHint: Domainku waa inuu tilmaamaa server-ka IP
wizard.stagingHint: Ma isticmaalo LE xadka heerka, shahaadada lama aamini doono
wizard.noSslWarning: La'aanteed HTTPS: makarafoon/kameerada wicitaanada, ogeysiisyada, goob-goboleedka lama heli doono. Browserrada qaarkood ayaa xanniba WebSocket iyaga oo aan lahayn SSL.
wizard.authDesc: U deji hababka soo gelida isticmaalayaasha noodhkaaga. Waad ka boodi kartaa tan oo ku dari kartaa hadhow goobaha.
wizard.passkeysDesc: Ku soo gal adiga oo isticmaalaya biometrics, Taabo ID ama PIN. Looma baahna adeeg dibadeed - wuxuu ku shaqeeyaa browserka/OS.
wizard.reviewDesc: Wax walba waxay u muuqdaan kuwo sax ah? Dejinta waxaa lagu kaydin doonaa faylka .env ka dib marka la bilaabo.
wizard.launchedDesc: Dejinta saaxir waa dhammaatay. Furitaanka interneedka muhiimka ah...
wizard.genCaCert: Soo saarida CA iyo shahaadada serverka...
wizard.enterAdminPassword: Geli erayga sirta ah ee maamulaha si aad u rakibto CA
wizard.caInstalled: CA lagu rakibay dukaanka aaminaada nidaamka - dib u bilow biraawsarkaaga
wizard.sslSkipped: SSL waa la booday. Node wuxuu socon doonaa HTTP.

onboarding.step1Text: Riix halkan si aad u abuurto qol sheeko cusub
onboarding.step2Text: La wadaag code-kan asxaabta si aad ugu casuunto
onboarding.step3Text: Ku qor fariintaada ugu horeysa oo ku dhufo Gelida
onboarding.step4Text: Dhammaan fariimaha waa la siray - adiga iyo qaataha kaliya ayaa akhrin kara iyaga
onboarding.step5Text: Sahami Vortex - samee qolal, ku dar xiriiriyeyaasha, habbee dejinta
